author: deez337
content:
OK, This is for the guys that are looking for info about the available SC setups for the V6 engines. All information is "factual and unbiased" and I would like to keep it that way. Please no opinions on who likes what more and why. This is just to give fair information, not to bash or a vs. thread. If anyone would like to correct me or have me add something please let me know.

Alpine Developments does not sell these kits anymore. If a site offers to sell one new, you will not recieve anything. Buyer Beware!

Alpine Developments- These guys were really the first on the scene with roots type sc setups for the V6 Tiburons. They use Eaton mp62 blowers and come in 3 stages. They have the most history and equipment on Tiburons. Also only kit available that is CARB legal at the current moment.

*******Stage 0- Our entry-level supercharger system is an affordable way to get more performance from your vehicle, and can be easily upgraded to our Stage 1 or 2 in the future. Designed as a simple bolt-on, this kit requires no additional engine modifications. Performance is improved up to 38 WHP (wheel horsepower), taking the stock vehicle from 143WHP to 181WHP. This is achieved with 4lbs.of boost, and does not require any additional fuel modifications.

Included in the Kit
- Eaton MP62 Supercharger
- Aluminium inlet manifold and support plate
- Aluminium throttle body adaptor
- 4psi supercharger pulley (Actual boost level may vary according to current modification level)
- All necessary hardware and instructions for complete install
MSRP: US $2550

[IMAGE: Alpine Stage 0/1 supercharger kit]

*****Stage 1- Dyno tests on our liquid-to-air intercooled supercharger system for the 2.7L V6 have shown power gains of over 50HP & 40ft/lbs of torque to the wheels. Our test vehicle showed improvement from 143WHP to 193WHP, with flywheel horsepower obviously being more. Boost remains at 4lbs, but the kit includes a stand-alone liquid-to-air intercooler system. No additional fuel modifications required.

Included in the Kit
- Eaton MP62 supercharger
- Cast aluminium inlet manifold, incorporating Laminova cooler and support plate
- Cast aluminium throttle body adaptor
- 4psi supercharger pulley (Actual boost level may vary according to current modification level)
- Water radiator and mounting brackets
- Water pump
- Water reservoir
- All necessary plumbing and hardware for complete install
MSRP US $3350 (complete system)
MSRP US $800 (upgrade from stage 0)

[IMAGE: Alpine Stage 1 supercharger kit]

*****Stage 2- Dyno tests on our liquid-to-air intercooled supercharger system for the 2.7L V6 have shown power gains of over 82HP & 80ft/lbs of torque to the wheels. Our test vehicle showed improvement from 163WHP to 265WHP, with flywheel horsepower obviously being more.

Included in the Kit
- Cast aluminium inlet manifold, incorporating Laminova cooler and support plate
- Cast aluminium throttle body adaptor with integrated 7th fuel injector
- 8psi supercharger pulley (Actual boost level may vary according to current modification level)
- Water radiator and mounting brackets
- Water pump
- Water reservoir
- Unichip Piggyback ECU for complete timing and fuel control
- All necessary hardware and instructions for complete install
*Can be upgraded from Stage 0 or Stage 1 Supercharger Systems*
MSRP US $4150

Same as stage 1 plus unichip fuel tuner

Some members that have them equipped- Mines Better, UnholyTib, Mr.Photoman just to name a few.

*information taken from Alpines site*

author: deez337
content:
Next Generation Motorsports- NGM is also known for their Eaton roots style blowers and before creating their own they also modified other applications to the owners preference. The following is taken from their website. Owned and operated by Tim Conni of Ft. Lauderdale.

****Sniper- This kit is designed to be bolted on to a completely stock 2.7L 2003+ Tiburon. The kit yields between 3-5lbs of boost and 200+whp. The kit is fully upgradeable to Assassin status if desired. The manifold gets powdercoated your color of choice.
Included in this kit:
- Eaton 4th Generation MP62 Blower
- NGM Fully Fabricated, CNC'ed, TIG Welded Ice Box Intake
- NGM High Flow Billet Plenum
- Belt
- Complete Billet Brackets & Accessories
- Full Stainless Mounting Hardware
MSRP- $2695.00

[IMAGE: NGM Sniper kit]

****Assassin- Only kit to offer a Eaton Mp90 Blower on the market at this time. The Assassin kit produces about 7-8lbs of boost. NGM also has a very nice dyno on a stock bottom end with 8-10lbs of boost making 302whp.
Included in this kit:
- Eaton 4th Generation MP90 Roots Blower
- Fully fabricated, CNC'ed, TIG Welded NGM Ice Box Intake Manifold
- NGM High Flow 90MM Billet Plenum
- NGM Front Mount Ice Box Resevoir & Heat Exchanger Kit
- NGM Exclusive 460CC Injectors
- NGM Mafterburner Stage II Fuel Tuner
- MafExtender
- Belt
- NGM Billet Throttle Body Adaptor
- Complete Billet Brackets & Accessories
- Full Stainless Mounting Hardware
- The manifold gets powdercoated your choice of color.
MSRP $4695.00

[IMAGE: NGM Assassin kit]

Assassin Dyno with 8-10 lbs of boost

[IMAGE: NGM Assassin dyno chart]

Some members that have this equipped- 12secondTib, Zeenon53 and more all the time.

*information taken from NGM's site*

content:
Hey I was just wondering, if I get this supercharger installed and lets say it brings the stock V6 2.7L to 200+ WHP, would this require me to change my clutch to a stage 1 or 2 in order to keep up with the performance? Would there be any other things I would need to add or change?

Thanks.

author: deez337
content:
Ripp Modifications- The company that brought you Vortech SDS superchargers. Alot of people say that these are the most effecient kind of sc available on the market today. They are available in 2 packages.

****Tuner Package (or stage 1 as it is known)- RIPP Modifications unique approach to product development brings together a system with the level of refinement that your car has been waiting for.
Included in this kit:
- RIPP SDS (Supercharger Drive System) 6061 Aluminum CNC design and fabricated
- Vortech V5-VSQ G-Trim Supercharger (Quiet gear drive and polished)
- RIPP Blow Off Valve
- RIPP 6061 Aluminum piping
- RIPP Battery relocation system
- RIPP No weld oil return
- Four Ply silicon hose (Black Only)
- Hard ware and clamps included
- Oil feed fitting
- Oil feed/return lines
- Fully illustrated Instruction
- One year limited warranty
MSRP $3499.95

[IMAGE: RIPP Stage 1 kit]

****Stage 2- 5-6 psi...290.0 WHP GT manual, 283.7 WHP GT Auto
Included in this kit:
- RIPP SDS (Supercharger Drive System) 6061 Aluminum CNC designed and fabricated
- RIPP Black Box Preprogrammed Fuel and timing controller
- Cable/Software
- RIPP BRAT Fix (ECU Stabilizer)
- RIPP 2 Bar MAP Sensor for exact ECU boost communication
- RIPP/Vortech V5 G-Trim Supercharger (VSQ Option)
- RIPP By Pass Valve
- RC Engineering Injectors with clips
- Malpassi Rising rate fuel pressure regulator with gauge
- 2.75" 6061 aluminum piping
- Four Ply silicon hose (Gloss Black Red or Blue)
- Walboro 255 in tank Fuel pump
- All hardware and clamps included
- Illustrated Instructions and tech tips
- One year warranty included from date of purchase
MSRP $4199.99

[IMAGE: RIPP Stage 2 kit]

Resident expert- Boostology

Some members that have it equipped- Grasshopper, dzignr_tastz and a few others

*information taken from Ripps site*

author: PsTibby
content:
Hello,
Well seeing how this is the Supercharge Thread. Got a question.. Details on my car. Its 06 V6. Have header,CAI,Exhaust,NGM Throttle Body.stage 3 clutch/flywheel. Well im going to be ordering my NGM Stage 3 supercharger kit in a month or so. What else should I get aswell so I can add to the list?
I know about motor mounts already thats on my list to get aswell.. below I just copy and pasted so if some dont know what it comes with they can see, and maybe help me in some way.. Thank you everyone..
The NGM Stage III Iced Sniper kit comes complete with the following components. You get the Eaton MP62 roots supercharger, NGM CNC'ed fully Tig welded Ice Box Intake manifold, NGM High Flow billet inlet plenum, NGM heat exchanger & resevoir setup, NGM Plug-N-Play 360cc injectors, NGM 2.8" supercharger pulley, NGM Billet 2-piece 6.5" lower crank pulley, fuel tuner, belt, stainless hardware, billet brackets and accessories, coolant hoses, integral Bosch high flow intercooler pump, and your choice of powdercoated colors to add a custom personal touch. Then, we top it off with our chrome plated insignia plate to add a look that is in a class of its own.

author: Stitch702
content: Get an oil catch can to prevent oil blow back so you don't mess up your core in your manifold..other than that you are pretty much set. Since you already got I/H/E. The stage 3 sniper pretty much comes with everything you need.

author: PsTibby
content: Stitch thanks for the heads up on catch can. Ahead of you on that one ordered that about four days ago. So should be good to go I take it then?

author: tiburonracer7
content: will all of these superchargers work with an automatic? I was told the assassin only works with manuals? is this true? any help is wonderful! thanks

author: T06Crush
content: A supercharger system can be put on an auto or manual. If you have a V6, then you have the option of going with the Alpine, Sniper, or Assassin. Research each carefully & wisely, though, for pro's and cons.
